cookieBanner.title: Manage cookies
cookieBanner.subTitle: We use cookies to improve our services. Essential cookies are necessary for our site to work as intended.
cookieBanner.description: By selecting "Allow all", you allow us to use optional cookies for additional purposes, such as measuring the effectiveness and relevance of ads. Optional cookies also help us better measure the performance of our advertising campaigns.

settings.description: Used for measuring the effectiveness and relevance of ads.
Necessary for the site to work as intended.
